title: Euphonic Sessions with Kyau & Albert - September 2022
description:
01 Máximo Lasso - Just Another Riff [Euphonic]
02 Andy Moor & Adam White pres. Whiteroom - The Whiteroom (Marsh Remix) [Anjunadeep]
03 Kyau & Albert with Marc Marberg - Orange Bill (Cressida Remix) [Euphonic]
04 Vintage & Morelli - Once Upon A World [Monstercat Silk]
05 Kyau & Albert - Always A Fool (Jope Remix) [Euphonic]	
06 Vintage Culture & Three Drives - Greece 2000 [Armada Music]
07 Em Kolé - Satellite In Orbit [Euphonic]
08 Tinlicker - Just To Hear You Say (Joseph Ray Remix) [Anjunadeep] [TRACK OF THE MONTH]
09 Jerome Isma-Ae & Weekend Heroes  - Left To Hide [Anjunabeats]
10 Beatsole - Inaccessible Worlds [Elliptical Sun]
11 Above & Beyond ft Marty Longstaff - Chains [Anjunabeats]
12 Behind The Sunset - Change (Purple Stories Remix) [Intonenation Records / Taxigirl Music]
13 Alex Sonata & TheRio - Breath Of The Wild [Anjunabeats]
14 Tommy Farrow - Maybe Its Possible [Armada Electronic Elements]
15 Anyma (ofc) & Chris Avantgarde - Consciousness (Eric Prydz Remix) [Afterlife]
16 LÜRUM - Apollo [Armind]
17 mOat - Rain (Club Mix) [Armada Music]
18 Emod x soaringjupiter - Spacecast [Vested Recordings]
19 Simon Doty - Tattoo [Anjunadeep]
20 Marco Lys, Tube & Berger - Starter [Armada Subjekt]
21 Leen Vice - Secret Place [Sirup Music]
22 Michael Anthony - Something Better [Sirup Music]
23 Giuseppe Ottaviani & Christian Burns - Closer [Black Hole]
24 ocien - We ve Got It [Alter Ego Progressive]
25 Corren Cavini - Haunted [Zerothree]
